description: Capabilities for the Nomads main window. The SPA loads from http://127.0.0.1:<random-port> (the embedded Go server), so we must opt-in via remote.urls to allow this capability to apply to that 'remote' origin. Tauri's loopback URL is treated as remote by default. Per the desktop-shell spec, every IPC command AND every Tauri built-in plugin permission MUST be enumerated explicitly.
